attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
BATCH_ID,
LINE_NUM,
CANCEL_FLAG,
ITEM_DESCRIPTION,
QUANTITY,
UNIT_PRICE,
CLOSED_CODE,
GLOBAL_NAME,
PO_LINE_ID,
PO_HEADER_ID,
LINE_TYPE_ID,
UNIT_MEAS_LOOKUP_CODE,
ORG_ID,
CANCEL_REASON,
CANCEL_DATE,
CANCELLED_BY,
GES_UPDATE_DATE,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
CLOSED_DATE,
CREATED_BY,
CREATION_DATE,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
CREATE_DATETIME,
ACTION_CODE,
TAXABLE_FLAG,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
 /*STAFF_AUG_PO_START_END_DATES*/
ATTRIBUTE4,
ATTRIBUTE5,
ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
ATTRIBUTE9
FROM
                                ( 
                                SELECT 
                                                STMPOL.BATCH_ID,
                                                STMPOL.LINE_NUM,
                                                STMPOL.CANCEL_FLAG,
                                                STMPOL.ITEM_DESCRIPTION,
                                                STMPOL.QUANTITY,
                                                STMPOL.UNIT_PRICE,
                                                STMPOL.CLOSED_CODE,
                                                STMPOL.GLOBAL_NAME,
                                                STMPOL.PO_LINE_ID,
                                                STMPOL.PO_HEADER_ID,
                                                STMPOL.LINE_TYPE_ID,
                                                STMPOL.UNIT_MEAS_LOOKUP_CODE,
                                                STMPOL.ORG_ID,
                                                STMPOL.CANCEL_REASON,
                                                STMPOL.CANCEL_DATE,
                                                STMPOL.CANCELLED_BY,
                                                STMPOL.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
                                                STMPOL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
                                                STMPOL.CLOSED_DATE,
                                                STMPOL.CREATED_BY,
                                                STMPOL.CREATION_DATE,
                                                STMPOL.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
                                                STMPOL.CREATE_DATETIME,
                                                STMPOL.ACTION_CODE,  
                                                STMPOL.TAXABLE_FLAG  ,
                                                /*STAFF_AUG_PO_START_END_DATES*/
                                                STMPOL.ATTRIBUTE4,
                                                STMPOL.ATTRIBUTE5,
                                                 STMPOL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
                                                 STMPOL.ATTRIBUTE9
                                FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_PO_LINES_ALL STMPOL
                                                                ) SMOPL
WHERE
(
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_TYPE_CD,LINE_TYPE_ID,GLOBAL_NAME 
                                                                                                                FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_PO_LINE_TYPES_TL ELPLT, 
                                                                                                                     $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_TYPE NPOLT
                                                                                                                WHERE ELPLT.LINE_TYPE= NPOLT.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_TYPE_CD) POLTYPE
                                    WHERE  POLTYPE.LINE_TYPE_ID = SMOPL.LINE_TYPE_ID
                                       AND POLTYPE.GLOBAL_NAME = SMOPL.GLOBAL_NAME)
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER NPO, $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
                                                                                                WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SMOPL.GLOBAL_NAME
                                                                                                                AND NPO.SK_PURCHASE_ORDR_HEADER_ID_INT=SMOPL.PO_HEADER_ID
                                                                                                                AND NPO.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
)
UNION ALL
SELECT
BATCH_ID,
LINE_NUM,
CANCEL_FLAG,
ITEM_DESCRIPTION,
QUANTITY,
UNIT_PRICE,
CLOSED_CODE,
GLOBAL_NAME,
PO_LINE_ID,
PO_HEADER_ID,
LINE_TYPE_ID,
UNIT_MEAS_LOOKUP_CODE,
ORG_ID,
CANCEL_REASON,
CANCEL_DATE,
CANCELLED_BY,
GES_UPDATE_DATE,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
CLOSED_DATE,
CREATED_BY,
CREATION_DATE,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
CREATE_DATETIME,
ACTION_CODE,
TAXABLE_FLAG, 
 /*STAFF_AUG_PO_START_END_DATES*/
ATTRIBUTE4,
ATTRIBUTE5,
ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
'LV' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
ATTRIBUTE9
FROM
                                ( 
                                SELECT 
                                                STMPOL.BATCH_ID,
                                                STMPOL.LINE_NUM,
                                                STMPOL.CANCEL_FLAG,
                                                STMPOL.ITEM_DESCRIPTION,
                                                STMPOL.QUANTITY,
                                                STMPOL.UNIT_PRICE,
                                                STMPOL.CLOSED_CODE,
                                                STMPOL.GLOBAL_NAME,
                                                STMPOL.PO_LINE_ID,
                                                STMPOL.PO_HEADER_ID,
                                                STMPOL.LINE_TYPE_ID,
                                                STMPOL.UNIT_MEAS_LOOKUP_CODE,
                                                STMPOL.ORG_ID,
                                                STMPOL.CANCEL_REASON,
                                                STMPOL.CANCEL_DATE,
                                                STMPOL.CANCELLED_BY,
                                                STMPOL.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
                                                STMPOL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
                                                STMPOL.CLOSED_DATE,
                                                STMPOL.CREATED_BY,
                                                STMPOL.CREATION_DATE,
                                                STMPOL.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
                                                STMPOL.CREATE_DATETIME,
                                                STMPOL.ACTION_CODE,
                                                STMPOL.TAXABLE_FLAG,
						 /*STAFF_AUG_PO_START_END_DATES*/
                                                STMPOL.ATTRIBUTE4,    
                                                STMPOL.ATTRIBUTE5,
                                                STMPOL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, 
                                                 STMPOL.ATTRIBUTE9
                                FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_PO_LINES_ALL STMPOL
                                WHERE STMPOL.QUANTITY >99999999999.9999999
                                                ) SMOPL

SELECT   RANK () OVER (ORDER BY SMOPL.PO_LINE_ID,SMOPL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) + MAX_VAL PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
       SMOPL.PO_LINE_ID, SMOPL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  FROM (SELECT SINT.PO_LINE_ID, NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
          FROM 
(SELECT PO_LINE_ID, GLOBAL_NAME  FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_PO_LINES_ALL

UNION ALL 
SELECT PO_LINE_ID, GLOBAL_NAME  FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_PO_LINES_ALL) SINT,


               $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
         WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SINT.GLOBAL_NAME) SMOPL,
       (SELECT COALESCE (MAX (PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_KEY), 0) MAX_VAL  FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE) SMPOL
 WHERE NOT EXISTS (          SELECT 1
            FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE SPOL
           WHERE SPOL.SK_PO_LINE_ID_INT = SMOPL.PO_LINE_ID
             AND SPOL.SS_CD = SMOPL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)

SELECT 
 SMPOL.PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
 ,POLTYPE.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_TYPE_CD AS BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_TYPE_CD
 ,NPO.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM AS BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM 
 ,NPO.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_CREATE_DT AS BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_CREATE_DT 
 ,STEXPOL.ITEM_DESCRIPTION AS PO_LINE_ITEM_DESCR
 ,'UNKNOWN' AS PO_LINE_NOTE_TXT
 ,STEXPOL.UNIT_PRICE AS PO_LINE_UNIT_PRICE_AMT
 ,COALESCE(STEXPOL.CANCEL_FLAG, 'N') AS PO_LINE_CANCELLED_ROLE
 ,CASE WHEN STEXPOL.QUANTITY >99999999999.9999999 THEN 1 
       ELSE COALESCE(STEXPOL.QUANTITY,0)
       END AS PO_LINE_ORDERED_QTY 
 ,STEXPOL.LINE_NUM AS BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_NUM_INT 
 ,COALESCE(STEXPOL.CLOSED_CODE ,'OPEN') AS PO_LINE_STATUS_CD
 ,'N' AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG
 ,NPO.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY AS PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY
 ,COALESCE(NIUM.BK_ITEM_UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CD_UP,'UNKNOWN') AS ITEM_UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CD
 ,CAST(STEXPOL.CANCEL_DATE AS DATE) RU_PO_LINE_CANCELLED_DT
 ,CASE WHEN STEXPOL.CANCEL_FLAG ='Y'
       THEN (CASE WHEN STEXPOL.QUANTITY >99999999999.9999999 THEN 1 ELSE STEXPOL.QUANTITY END )
       ELSE NULL END AS RU_PO_LINE_CANCELLED_QTY
 ,COALESCE(NCWPKEY.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS RU_PO_LN_CNCLD_WRKR_PRTY_KEY
 ,STEXPOL.CANCEL_REASON AS RU_PO_LINE_CNCLD_REASON_DESCR
 ,STEXPOL.PO_LINE_ID AS SK_PO_LINE_ID_INT
 ,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE AS SS_CD
 ,COALESCE(STEXPOL.PO_LINE_TAXABLE_FLAG,'=')
 /*STAFF_AUG_PO-START_END_DATES*/
 ,CAST (CAST((CASE WHEN STEXPOL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY = 'Misc.Services' 
 THEN STEXPOL.ATTRIBUTE4 ELSE NULL END ) AS TIMESTAMP(0) FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DDBHH:MI:SS') AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS RU_SERVICE_START_DT 
 ,CAST (CAST((CASE WHEN STEXPOL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY = 'Misc.Services' 
 THEN STEXPOL.ATTRIBUTE5 ELSE NULL END ) AS TIMESTAMP(0) FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DDBHH:MI:SS') AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS RU_SERVICE_END_DT
  , COALESCE (STEXPOL.ATTRIBUTE9,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_ORIGINAL_DEPT_CD
   ,COALESCE (NFD1.BK_COMPANY_CODE , 'UNK') AS BK_ORIGINAL_COMPANY_CD
   ,STEXPOL.ACTION_CODE as ACTION_CODE
 FROM 
                 (
                 SELECT 
                                 STMPOL.LINE_NUM,
                                 STMPOL.CANCEL_FLAG,
                                 STMPOL.ITEM_DESCRIPTION,
                                 STMPOL.QUANTITY,
                                 STMPOL.UNIT_PRICE,
                                 STMPOL.CLOSED_CODE,
                                 STMPOL.GLOBAL_NAME,
                                 STMPOL.PO_LINE_ID,
                                 STMPOL.PO_HEADER_ID,
                                 STMPOL.LINE_TYPE_ID,
                                 UPPER(STMPOL.UNIT_MEAS_LOOKUP_CODE) AS UNIT_MEAS_LOOKUP_CODE_UP,
                                 STMPOL.ORG_ID,
                                 STMPOL.CANCEL_REASON,
                                 STMPOL.CANCEL_DATE,
                                 STMPOL.CANCELLED_BY,
                                 STMPOL.ACTION_CODE,
                  STMPOL.TAXABLE_FLAG PO_LINE_TAXABLE_FLAG  ,
                                 /*STAFF_AUG_PO-START_END_DATES*/
                                 STMPOL.ATTRIBUTE4,
                                 STMPOL.ATTRIBUTE5,
                                 STMPOL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
								 STMPOL.ATTRIBUTE9
                 FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_PO_LINES_ALL STMPOL
                                 UNION ALL
                                 SELECT 
                                 EXPOL.LINE_NUM,
                                 EXPOL.CANCEL_FLAG,
                                 EXPOL.ITEM_DESCRIPTION,
                                 EXPOL.QUANTITY,
                                 EXPOL.UNIT_PRICE,
                                 EXPOL.CLOSED_CODE,
                                 EXPOL.GLOBAL_NAME,
                                 EXPOL.PO_LINE_ID,
                                 EXPOL.PO_HEADER_ID,
                                 EXPOL.LINE_TYPE_ID,
                                 UPPER(EXPOL.UNIT_MEAS_LOOKUP_CODE) AS UNIT_MEAS_LOOKUP_CODE_UP,
                                 EXPOL.ORG_ID,
                                 EXPOL.CANCEL_REASON,
                                 EXPOL.CANCEL_DATE,
                                 EXPOL.CANCELLED_BY,
                                 EXPOL.ACTION_CODE,
                                 EXPOL.TAXABLE_FLAG PO_LINE_TAXABLE_FLAG,
                                 /*STAFF_AUG_PO-START_END_DATES*/
                                 EXPOL.ATTRIBUTE4,
                                 EXPOL.ATTRIBUTE5,
                                 EXPOL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
								 EXPOL.ATTRIBUTE9
                 FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_PO_LINES EXPOL
      where  EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI'
                 )STEXPOL
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
                 ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = STEXPOL.GLOBAL_NAME)
 INNER JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE SMPOL
                 ON (SMPOL.SK_PO_LINE_ID_INT = STEXPOL.PO_LINE_ID
                                 AND SMPOL.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) 
 INNER JOIN (SELECT NPOLT.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_TYPE_CD,ELPLT.LINE_TYPE_ID,ELPLT.GLOBAL_NAME 
                                 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_PO_LINE_TYPES_TL ELPLT,
                                      $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_TYPE NPOLT
                                 WHERE ELPLT.LINE_TYPE= NPOLT.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_TYPE_CD) POLTYPE
                 ON ( POLTYPE.LINE_TYPE_ID = STEXPOL.LINE_TYPE_ID
                                 AND POLTYPE.GLOBAL_NAME = STEXPOL.GLOBAL_NAME)
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER NPO
                 ON (NPO.SK_PURCHASE_ORDR_HEADER_ID_INT=STEXPOL.PO_HEADER_ID
                                 AND NPO.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
 LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT UPPER(BK_ITEM_UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CD) AS BK_ITEM_UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CD_UP
                   FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ITEM_UNIT_OF_MEASURE GROUP BY 1) NIUM
                      ON( BK_ITEM_UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CD_UP=STEXPOL.UNIT_MEAS_LOOKUP_CODE_UP )
 LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT ELFU.USER_ID,ELFU.GLOBAL_NAME,NCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY 
                                 FROM    $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_USER ELFU,
                                                                 $$ETLVWDB.EV_EL_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F ELPPF,
                                                                 $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP
                                                 WHERE 
                                                 ELFU.EMPLOYEE_ID=ELPPF.PERSON_ID 
                                                 AND ELFU.GLOBAL_NAME=ELPPF.GLOBAL_NAME
                                                 AND NCWP.BK_EMPLOYEE_ID =ELPPF.EMPLOYEE_NUMBER 
                                                 ) NCWPKEY 
                 ON(NCWPKEY.USER_ID = STEXPOL.CANCELLED_BY 
                                 AND NCWPKEY.GLOBAL_NAME = STEXPOL.GLOBAL_NAME)                   
LEFT OUTER JOIN (
SELECT BK_COMPANY_CODE,BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE ORDER BY BK_COMPANY_CODE) = 1) NFD1 
	ON NFD1.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE = STEXPOL.ATTRIBUTE9

SELECT
PO_LINE_ID,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
PO_HEADER_ID,
LINE_TYPE_ID,
LINE_NUM,
ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE,
PURCHASE_BASIS,
MATCHING_BASIS,
LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,
CREATION_DATE,
CREATED_BY,
ITEM_ID,
ITEM_REVISION,
CATEGORY_ID,
ITEM_DESCRIPTION,
UNIT_MEAS_LOOKUP_CODE,
QUANTITY_COMMITTED,
COMMITTED_AMOUNT,
ALLOW_PRICE_OVERRIDE_FLAG,
NOT_TO_EXCEED_PRICE,
LIST_PRICE_PER_UNIT,
UNIT_PRICE,
QUANTITY,
UN_NUMBER_ID,
HAZARD_CLASS_ID,
NOTE_TO_VENDOR,
FROM_HEADER_ID,
FROM_LINE_ID,
MIN_ORDER_QUANTITY,
MAX_ORDER_QUANTITY,
QTY_RCV_TOLERANCE,
OVER_TOLERANCE_ERROR_FLAG,
MARKET_PRICE,
UNORDERED_FLAG,
CLOSED_FLAG,
USER_HOLD_FLAG,
CANCEL_FLAG,
CANCELLED_BY,
CANCEL_DATE,
CANCEL_REASON,
FIRM_STATUS_LOOKUP_CODE,
FIRM_DATE,
VENDOR_PRODUCT_NUM,
CONTRACT_NUM,
TAXABLE_FLAG,
TAX_NAME,
TYPE_1099,
CAPITAL_EXPENSE_FLAG,
NEGOTIATED_BY_PREPARER_FLAG,
ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
ATTRIBUTE1,
ATTRIBUTE2,
ATTRIBUTE3,
ATTRIBUTE4,
ATTRIBUTE5,
ATTRIBUTE6,
ATTRIBUTE7,
ATTRIBUTE8,
ATTRIBUTE9,
ATTRIBUTE10,
REFERENCE_NUM,
ATTRIBUTE11,
ATTRIBUTE12,
ATTRIBUTE13,
ATTRIBUTE14,
ATTRIBUTE15,
MIN_RELEASE_AMOUNT,
PRICE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE,
CLOSED_CODE,
PRICE_BREAK_LOOKUP_CODE,
USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE,
GOVERNMENT_CONTEXT,
REQUEST_ID,
PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID,
PROGRAM_ID,
PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE,
CLOSED_DATE,
CLOSED_REASON,
CLOSED_BY,
TRANSACTION_REASON_CODE,
ORG_ID,
QC_GRADE,
BASE_UOM,
BASE_QTY,
SECONDARY_UOM,
SECONDARY_QTY,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE1,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE2,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE4,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE5,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE6,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE8,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE9,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE10,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE11,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE12,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE13,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE14,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE15,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE16,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE17,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE18,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE19,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE20,
LINE_REFERENCE_NUM,
PROJECT_ID,
TASK_ID,
EXPIRATION_DATE,
TAX_CODE_ID,
OKE_CONTRACT_HEADER_ID,
OKE_CONTRACT_VERSION_ID,
SECONDARY_QUANTITY,
SECONDARY_UNIT_OF_MEASURE,
PREFERRED_GRADE,
AUCTION_HEADER_ID,
AUCTION_DISPLAY_NUMBER,
AUCTION_LINE_NUMBER,
BID_NUMBER,
BID_LINE_NUMBER,
RETROACTIVE_DATE,
FROM_LINE_LOCATION_ID,
SUPPLIER_REF_NUMBER,
CONTRACT_ID,
START_DATE,
AMOUNT,
JOB_ID,
CONTRACTOR_FIRST_NAME,
CONTRACTOR_LAST_NAME,
SVC_AMOUNT_NOTIF_SENT,
SVC_COMPLETION_NOTIF_SENT,
BASE_UNIT_PRICE,
MANUAL_PRICE_CHANGE_FLAG,
RETAINAGE_RATE,
MAX_RETAINAGE_AMOUNT,
PROGRESS_PAYMENT_RATE,
RECOUPMENT_RATE,
CATALOG_NAME,
SUPPLIER_PART_AUXID,
IP_CATEGORY_ID,
TAX_ATTRIBUTE_UPDATE_CODE,
LAST_UPDATED_PROGRAM,
GROUP_LINE_ID,
LINE_NUM_DISPLAY,
CLM_INFO_FLAG,
CLM_OPTION_INDICATOR,
CLM_BASE_LINE_NUM,
CLM_OPTION_NUM,
CLM_OPTION_FROM_DATE,
CLM_OPTION_TO_DATE,
CLM_FUNDED_FLAG,
CONTRACT_TYPE,
COST_CONSTRAINT,
CLM_IDC_TYPE,
UDA_TEMPLATE_ID,
USER_DOCUMENT_STATUS,
DRAFT_ID,
CLM_EXERCISED_FLAG,
CLM_EXERCISED_DATE,
GES_UPDATE_DATE,
GLOBAL_NAME,
BATCH_ID,
CREATE_DATETIME,
ACTION_CODE,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
		( 
		SELECT 
			SCPLA.PO_LINE_ID
			,SCPLA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
			,SCPLA.LAST_UPDATED_BY
			,SCPLA.PO_HEADER_ID
			,SCPLA.LINE_TYPE_ID
			,SCPLA.LINE_NUM
			,SCPLA.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE
			,SCPLA.PURCHASE_BASIS
			,SCPLA.MATCHING_BASIS
			,SCPLA.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
			,SCPLA.CREATION_DATE
			,SCPLA.CREATED_BY
			,SCPLA.ITEM_ID
			,SCPLA.ITEM_REVISION
			,SCPLA.CATEGORY_ID
			,SCPLA.ITEM_DESCRIPTION
			,SCPLA.UNIT_MEAS_LOOKUP_CODE
			,SCPLA.QUANTITY_COMMITTED
			,SCPLA.COMMITTED_AMOUNT
			,SCPLA.ALLOW_PRICE_OVERRIDE_FLAG
			,SCPLA.NOT_TO_EXCEED_PRICE
			,SCPLA.LIST_PRICE_PER_UNIT
			,SCPLA.UNIT_PRICE
			,SCPLA.QUANTITY
			,SCPLA.UN_NUMBER_ID
			,SCPLA.HAZARD_CLASS_ID
			,SCPLA.NOTE_TO_VENDOR
			,SCPLA.FROM_HEADER_ID
			,SCPLA.FROM_LINE_ID
			,SCPLA.MIN_ORDER_QUANTITY
			,SCPLA.MAX_ORDER_QUANTITY
			,SCPLA.QTY_RCV_TOLERANCE
			,SCPLA.OVER_TOLERANCE_ERROR_FLAG
			,SCPLA.MARKET_PRICE
			,SCPLA.UNORDERED_FLAG
			,SCPLA.CLOSED_FLAG
			,SCPLA.USER_HOLD_FLAG
			,SCPLA.CANCEL_FLAG
			,SCPLA.CANCELLED_BY
			,SCPLA.CANCEL_DATE
			,SCPLA.CANCEL_REASON
			,SCPLA.FIRM_STATUS_LOOKUP_CODE
			,SCPLA.FIRM_DATE
			,SCPLA.VENDOR_PRODUCT_NUM
			,SCPLA.CONTRACT_NUM
			,SCPLA.TAXABLE_FLAG
			,SCPLA.TAX_NAME
			,SCPLA.TYPE_1099
			,SCPLA.CAPITAL_EXPENSE_FLAG
			,SCPLA.NEGOTIATED_BY_PREPARER_FLAG
			,SCPLA.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY
			,SCPLA.ATTRIBUTE1
			,SCPLA.ATTRIBUTE2
			,SCPLA.ATTRIBUTE3
			,SCPLA.ATTRIBUTE4
			,SCPLA.ATTRIBUTE5
			,SCPLA.ATTRIBUTE6
			,SCPLA.ATTRIBUTE7
			,SCPLA.ATTRIBUTE8
			,SCPLA.ATTRIBUTE9
			,SCPLA.ATTRIBUTE10
			,SCPLA.REFERENCE_NUM
			,SCPLA.ATTRIBUTE11
			,SCPLA.ATTRIBUTE12
			,SCPLA.ATTRIBUTE13
			,SCPLA.ATTRIBUTE14
			,SCPLA.ATTRIBUTE15
			,SCPLA.MIN_RELEASE_AMOUNT
			,SCPLA.PRICE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE
			,SCPLA.CLOSED_CODE
			,SCPLA.PRICE_BREAK_LOOKUP_CODE
			,SCPLA.USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE
			,SCPLA.GOVERNMENT_CONTEXT
			,SCPLA.REQUEST_ID
			,SCPLA.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID
			,SCPLA.PROGRAM_ID
			,SCPLA.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE
			,SCPLA.CLOSED_DATE
			,SCPLA.CLOSED_REASON
			,SCPLA.CLOSED_BY
			,SCPLA.TRANSACTION_REASON_CODE
			,SCPLA.ORG_ID
			,SCPLA.QC_GRADE
			,SCPLA.BASE_UOM
			,SCPLA.BASE_QTY
			,SCPLA.SECONDARY_UOM
			,SCPLA.SECONDARY_QTY
			,SCPLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY
			,SCPLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE1
			,SCPLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE2
			,SCPLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3
			,SCPLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE4
			,SCPLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE5
			,SCPLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE6
			,SCPLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7
			,SCPLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE8
			,SCPLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE9
			,SCPLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE10
			,SCPLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE11
			,SCPLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE12
			,SCPLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE13
			,SCPLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE14
			,SCPLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE15
			,SCPLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE16
			,SCPLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE17
			,SCPLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE18
			,SCPLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE19
			,SCPLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE20
			,SCPLA.LINE_REFERENCE_NUM
			,SCPLA.PROJECT_ID
			,SCPLA.TASK_ID
			,SCPLA.EXPIRATION_DATE
			,SCPLA.TAX_CODE_ID
			,SCPLA.OKE_CONTRACT_HEADER_ID
			,SCPLA.OKE_CONTRACT_VERSION_ID
			,SCPLA.SECONDARY_QUANTITY
			,SCPLA.SECONDARY_UNIT_OF_MEASURE
			,SCPLA.PREFERRED_GRADE
			,SCPLA.AUCTION_HEADER_ID
			,SCPLA.AUCTION_DISPLAY_NUMBER
			,SCPLA.AUCTION_LINE_NUMBER
			,SCPLA.BID_NUMBER
			,SCPLA.BID_LINE_NUMBER
			,SCPLA.RETROACTIVE_DATE
			,SCPLA.FROM_LINE_LOCATION_ID
			,SCPLA.SUPPLIER_REF_NUMBER
			,SCPLA.CONTRACT_ID
			,SCPLA.START_DATE
			,SCPLA.AMOUNT
			,SCPLA.JOB_ID
			,SCPLA.CONTRACTOR_FIRST_NAME
			,SCPLA.CONTRACTOR_LAST_NAME
			,SCPLA.SVC_AMOUNT_NOTIF_SENT
			,SCPLA.SVC_COMPLETION_NOTIF_SENT
			,SCPLA.BASE_UNIT_PRICE
			,SCPLA.MANUAL_PRICE_CHANGE_FLAG
			,SCPLA.RETAINAGE_RATE
			,SCPLA.MAX_RETAINAGE_AMOUNT
			,SCPLA.PROGRESS_PAYMENT_RATE
			,SCPLA.RECOUPMENT_RATE
			,SCPLA.CATALOG_NAME
			,SCPLA.SUPPLIER_PART_AUXID
			,SCPLA.IP_CATEGORY_ID
			,SCPLA.TAX_ATTRIBUTE_UPDATE_CODE
			,SCPLA.LAST_UPDATED_PROGRAM
			,SCPLA.GROUP_LINE_ID
			,SCPLA.LINE_NUM_DISPLAY
			,SCPLA.CLM_INFO_FLAG
			,SCPLA.CLM_OPTION_INDICATOR
			,SCPLA.CLM_BASE_LINE_NUM
			,SCPLA.CLM_OPTION_NUM
			,SCPLA.CLM_OPTION_FROM_DATE
			,SCPLA.CLM_OPTION_TO_DATE
			,SCPLA.CLM_FUNDED_FLAG
			,SCPLA.CONTRACT_TYPE
			,SCPLA.COST_CONSTRAINT
			,SCPLA.CLM_IDC_TYPE
			,SCPLA.UDA_TEMPLATE_ID
			,SCPLA.USER_DOCUMENT_STATUS
			,SCPLA.DRAFT_ID
			,SCPLA.CLM_EXERCISED_FLAG
			,SCPLA.CLM_EXERCISED_DATE
			,SCPLA.GES_UPDATE_DATE
			,SCPLA.GLOBAL_NAME
			,SCPLA.BATCH_ID
			,SCPLA.CREATE_DATETIME
			,SCPLA.ACTION_CODE

		FROM   $$STGDB.ST_CG1_PO_LINES_ALL  SCPLA /*STMPOL*/
				) SMOPL
WHERE
(
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_TYPE_CD,LINE_TYPE_ID,GLOBAL_NAME 
							FROM   $$ETLVWDB.EL_PO_LINE_TYPES_TL ELPLT, 
							       $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_TYPE NPOLT
							WHERE ELPLT.LINE_TYPE= NPOLT.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_TYPE_CD) 
POLTYPE
		    WHERE  POLTYPE.LINE_TYPE_ID = SMOPL.LINE_TYPE_ID
		       AND POLTYPE.GLOBAL_NAME = SMOPL.GLOBAL_NAME)
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER NPO,   $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
						WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SMOPL.GLOBAL_NAME
							AND NPO.SK_PURCHASE_ORDR_HEADER_ID_INT=SMOPL.PO_HEADER_ID
							AND NPO.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
)
UNION ALL

PO_LINE_ID,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,

LINE_TYPE_ID,

CONTRACTOR_FIRST_NAME,
CONTRACTOR_LAST_NAME,
SVC_AMOUNT_NOTIF_SENT,
SVC_COMPLETION_NOTIF_SENT,
BASE_UNIT_PRICE,
MANUAL_PRICE_CHANGE_FLAG,
RETAINAGE_RATE,
MAX_RETAINAGE_AMOUNT,
PROGRESS_PAYMENT_RATE,
RECOUPMENT_RATE,
CATALOG_NAME,
SUPPLIER_PART_AUXID,
IP_CATEGORY_ID,
TAX_ATTRIBUTE_UPDATE_CODE,
LAST_UPDATED_PROGRAM,
GROUP_LINE_ID,
LINE_NUM_DISPLAY,
CLM_INFO_FLAG,

CLM_BASE_LINE_NUM,
CLM_OPTION_NUM,
CLM_OPTION_FROM_DATE,
CLM_OPTION_TO_DATE,
CLM_FUNDED_FLAG,
CONTRACT_TYPE,
COST_CONSTRAINT,
CLM_IDC_TYPE,

FROM
		( 
		SELECT 
			SCPLA.PO_LINE_ID

			,SCPLA.HAZARD_CLASS_ID

			,SCPLA.FROM_HEADER_ID
			,SCPLA.FROM_LINE_ID
			,SCPLA.MIN_ORDER_QUANTITY
			,SCPLA.MAX_ORDER_QUANTITY
			,SCPLA.QTY_RCV_TOLERANCE
			,SCPLA.OVER_TOLERANCE_ERROR_FLAG
			,SCPLA.MARKET_PRICE

			,SCPLA.CANCELLED_BY
			,SCPLA.CANCEL_DATE

			,SCPLA.FIRM_STATUS_LOOKUP_CODE
			,SCPLA.FIRM_DATE
			,SCPLA.VENDOR_PRODUCT_NUM
			,SCPLA.CONTRACT_NUM
			,SCPLA.TAXABLE_FLAG
			,SCPLA.TAX_NAME
			,SCPLA.TYPE_1099
			,SCPLA.CAPITAL_EXPENSE_FLAG
			,SCPLA.NEGOTIATED_BY_PREPARER_FLAG
			,SCPLA.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY
			,SCPLA.ATTRIBUTE1
			,SCPLA.ATTRIBUTE2
			,SCPLA.ATTRIBUTE3
			,SCPLA.ATTRIBUTE4
			,SCPLA.ATTRIBUTE5
			,SCPLA.ATTRIBUTE6
			,SCPLA.ATTRIBUTE7
			,SCPLA.ATTRIBUTE8
			,SCPLA.ATTRIBUTE9
			,SCPLA.ATTRIBUTE10
			,SCPLA.REFERENCE_NUM
			,SCPLA.ATTRIBUTE11
			,SCPLA.ATTRIBUTE12
			,SCPLA.ATTRIBUTE13
			,SCPLA.ATTRIBUTE14
			,SCPLA.ATTRIBUTE15
			,SCPLA.MIN_RELEASE_AMOUNT
			,SCPLA.PRICE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE
			,SCPLA.CLOSED_CODE
			,SCPLA.PRICE_BREAK_LOOKUP_CODE
			,SCPLA.USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE
			,SCPLA.GOVERNMENT_CONTEXT
			,SCPLA.REQUEST_ID

			,SCPLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY
			,SCPLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE1
			,SCPLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE2
			,SCPLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3
			,SCPLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE4
			,SCPLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE5
			,SCPLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE6
			,SCPLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7
			,SCPLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE8
			,SCPLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE9
			,SCPLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE10
			,SCPLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE11
			,SCPLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE12
			,SCPLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE13
			,SCPLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE14
			,SCPLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE15
			,SCPLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE16
			,SCPLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE17
			,SCPLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE18
			,SCPLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE19
			,SCPLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE20
			,SCPLA.LINE_REFERENCE_NUM
			,SCPLA.PROJECT_ID
			,SCPLA.TASK_ID
			,SCPLA.EXPIRATION_DATE
			,SCPLA.TAX_CODE_ID
			,SCPLA.OKE_CONTRACT_HEADER_ID
			,SCPLA.OKE_CONTRACT_VERSION_ID
			,SCPLA.SECONDARY_QUANTITY

			,SCPLA.PREFERRED_GRADE
			,SCPLA.AUCTION_HEADER_ID
			,SCPLA.AUCTION_DISPLAY_NUMBER
			,SCPLA.AUCTION_LINE_NUMBER
			,SCPLA.BID_NUMBER
			,SCPLA.BID_LINE_NUMBER
			,SCPLA.RETROACTIVE_DATE
			,SCPLA.FROM_LINE_LOCATION_ID
			,SCPLA.SUPPLIER_REF_NUMBER
			,SCPLA.CONTRACT_ID
			,SCPLA.START_DATE
			,SCPLA.AMOUNT
			,SCPLA.JOB_ID
			,SCPLA.CONTRACTOR_FIRST_NAME
			,SCPLA.CONTRACTOR_LAST_NAME
			,SCPLA.SVC_AMOUNT_NOTIF_SENT
			,SCPLA.SVC_COMPLETION_NOTIF_SENT
			,SCPLA.BASE_UNIT_PRICE
			,SCPLA.MANUAL_PRICE_CHANGE_FLAG
			,SCPLA.RETAINAGE_RATE
			,SCPLA.MAX_RETAINAGE_AMOUNT
			,SCPLA.PROGRESS_PAYMENT_RATE
			,SCPLA.RECOUPMENT_RATE
			,SCPLA.CATALOG_NAME
			,SCPLA.SUPPLIER_PART_AUXID
			,SCPLA.IP_CATEGORY_ID
			,SCPLA.TAX_ATTRIBUTE_UPDATE_CODE
			,SCPLA.LAST_UPDATED_PROGRAM
			,SCPLA.GROUP_LINE_ID
			,SCPLA.LINE_NUM_DISPLAY
			,SCPLA.CLM_INFO_FLAG
			,SCPLA.CLM_OPTION_INDICATOR
			,SCPLA.CLM_BASE_LINE_NUM
			,SCPLA.CLM_OPTION_NUM
			,SCPLA.CLM_OPTION_FROM_DATE
			,SCPLA.CLM_OPTION_TO_DATE
			,SCPLA.CLM_FUNDED_FLAG
			,SCPLA.CONTRACT_TYPE
			,SCPLA.COST_CONSTRAINT
			,SCPLA.CLM_IDC_TYPE
			,SCPLA.UDA_TEMPLATE_ID
			,SCPLA.USER_DOCUMENT_STATUS
			,SCPLA.DRAFT_ID
			,SCPLA.CLM_EXERCISED_FLAG
			,SCPLA.CLM_EXERCISED_DATE
			,SCPLA.GES_UPDATE_DATE
			,SCPLA.GLOBAL_NAME
			,SCPLA.BATCH_ID
			,SCPLA.CREATE_DATETIME
			,SCPLA.ACTION_CODE

		FROM    $$STGDB.ST_CG1_PO_LINES_ALL SCPLA
		WHERE SCPLA.QUANTITY >99999999999.9999999
			) SMOPL

SELECT 
SMPOL.PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
,POLTYPE.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_TYPE_CD AS BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_TYPE_CD
,NPO.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM AS BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM 
,NPO.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_CREATE_DT AS BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_CREATE_DT 
,STEXPOL.ITEM_DESCRIPTION AS PO_LINE_ITEM_DESCR
,'UNKNOWN' AS PO_LINE_NOTE_TXT
,STEXPOL.UNIT_PRICE AS PO_LINE_UNIT_PRICE_AMT
,COALESCE(STEXPOL.CANCEL_FLAG, 'N') AS PO_LINE_CANCELLED_ROLE
,CASE WHEN STEXPOL.QUANTITY >99999999999.9999999 THEN 1 
      ELSE COALESCE(STEXPOL.QUANTITY,0)
      END AS PO_LINE_ORDERED_QTY 
,STEXPOL.LINE_NUM AS BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_NUM_INT 
,COALESCE(STEXPOL.CLOSED_CODE ,'OPEN') AS PO_LINE_STATUS_CD
,'N' AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG
,NPO.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY AS PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY
,COALESCE(NIUM.BK_ITEM_UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CD_UP,'UNKNOWN') AS ITEM_UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CD
,CAST(STEXPOL.CANCEL_DATE AS DATE) RU_PO_LINE_CANCELLED_DT
,CASE WHEN STEXPOL.CANCEL_FLAG ='Y'
      THEN (CASE WHEN STEXPOL.QUANTITY >99999999999.9999999 THEN 1 ELSE STEXPOL.QUANTITY END )
      ELSE NULL END AS RU_PO_LINE_CANCELLED_QTY
,COALESCE(NCWPKEY.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS RU_PO_LN_CNCLD_WRKR_PRTY_KEY
,STEXPOL.CANCEL_REASON AS RU_PO_LINE_CNCLD_REASON_DESCR
,STEXPOL.PO_LINE_ID AS SK_PO_LINE_ID_INT
,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE AS SS_CD
,COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY,-999) AS PRODUCT_KEY /* nmalay Added as part of Q1FY17 Buy Sell */
,STEXPOL.ACTION_CODE as ACTION_CODE
,COALESCE(STEXPOL.PO_LINE_TAXABLE_FLAG,'=')
FROM 
	(
	SELECT 
		SCPLA.LINE_NUM,
		SCPLA.CANCEL_FLAG,
		SCPLA.ITEM_DESCRIPTION,
		SCPLA.QUANTITY,
		SCPLA.UNIT_PRICE,
		SCPLA.CLOSED_CODE,
		SCPLA.GLOBAL_NAME,
		SCPLA.PO_LINE_ID,
		SCPLA.PO_HEADER_ID,
		SCPLA.LINE_TYPE_ID,
		UPPER(SCPLA.UNIT_MEAS_LOOKUP_CODE) AS UNIT_MEAS_LOOKUP_CODE_UP,
		SCPLA.ORG_ID,
		SCPLA.CANCEL_REASON,
		SCPLA.CANCEL_DATE,
		SCPLA.CANCELLED_BY,
		SCPLA.ACTION_CODE,
        SCPLA.TAXABLE_FLAG PO_LINE_TAXABLE_FLAG  ,
		SCPLA.ITEM_ID /* nmalay Added as part of Q1FY17 Buy Sell */
	FROM  $$STGDB.ST_CG1_PO_LINES_ALL  SCPLA  /* STMPOL */
		UNION ALL
		SELECT 
		ECPLA.LINE_NUM,
		ECPLA.CANCEL_FLAG,
		ECPLA.ITEM_DESCRIPTION,
		ECPLA.QUANTITY,
		ECPLA.UNIT_PRICE,
		ECPLA.CLOSED_CODE,
		ECPLA.GLOBAL_NAME,
		ECPLA.PO_LINE_ID,
		ECPLA.PO_HEADER_ID,
		ECPLA.LINE_TYPE_ID,
		UPPER(ECPLA.UNIT_MEAS_LOOKUP_CODE) AS UNIT_MEAS_LOOKUP_CODE_UP,
		ECPLA.ORG_ID,
		ECPLA.CANCEL_REASON,
		ECPLA.CANCEL_DATE,
		ECPLA.CANCELLED_BY,
		ECPLA.ACTION_CODE,
		ECPLA.TAXABLE_FLAG PO_LINE_TAXABLE_FLAG,
		ECPLA.ITEM_ID /* nmalay Added as part of Q1FY17 Buy Sell */
	FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_PO_LINES_ALL ECPLA /* EXPOL*/
     where  EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI'
	)STEXPOL
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = STEXPOL.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE SMPOL
	ON (SMPOL.SK_PO_LINE_ID_INT = STEXPOL.PO_LINE_ID
		AND SMPOL.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) 
INNER JOIN (SELECT NPOLT.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_TYPE_CD,ELPLT.LINE_TYPE_ID,ELPLT.GLOBAL_NAME 
		FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_PO_LINE_TYPES_TL ELPLT,
		     $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_TYPE NPOLT
		WHERE ELPLT.LINE_TYPE= NPOLT.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_TYPE_CD AND GLOBAL_NAME='CG' AND LANGUAGE_CODE='US') POLTYPE
	ON ( POLTYPE.LINE_TYPE_ID = STEXPOL.LINE_TYPE_ID
		AND POLTYPE.GLOBAL_NAME = STEXPOL.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER NPO
	ON (NPO.SK_PURCHASE_ORDR_HEADER_ID_INT=STEXPOL.PO_HEADER_ID
		AND NPO.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT UPPER(BK_ITEM_UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CD) AS BK_ITEM_UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CD_UP
                  FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ITEM_UNIT_OF_MEASURE GROUP BY 1) NIUM
	     ON( BK_ITEM_UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CD_UP=STEXPOL.UNIT_MEAS_LOOKUP_CODE_UP )
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT ELFU.USER_ID,ELFU.GLOBAL_NAME,NCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY 
	        	FROM    $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_USER ELFU,
				$$ETLVWDB.EV_EL_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F ELPPF,
				$$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP
			WHERE 
			ELFU.EMPLOYEE_ID=ELPPF.PERSON_ID 
			AND ELFU.GLOBAL_NAME=ELPPF.GLOBAL_NAME
			AND NCWP.BK_EMPLOYEE_ID =ELPPF.EMPLOYEE_NUMBER 
			) NCWPKEY 
	ON(NCWPKEY.USER_ID = STEXPOL.CANCELLED_BY 
		AND NCWPKEY.GLOBAL_NAME = STEXPOL.GLOBAL_NAME)
		
/* nmalay Added as part of Q1FY17 Buy Sell */		
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
	ON NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT = STEXPOL.ITEM_ID
